summary: Classified the five open PRs independently as a live inventory shard. No shared canonical exists, no security-sensitive items were detected, and no close, merge, fix, or label actions are safe under this job's permissions and hydrated evidence.

actions.reason: Independent open contributor PR with unresolved proof/review blockers; do not close or merge from this inventory shard.
Independent broad feature PR with unresolved review/author state; no close-style action is justified and merge/fix are blocked by the job.
Independent focused bug-fix PR that should stay on the normal maintainer/review path; this inventory job cannot merge or repair it.
Independent ready-for-maintainer PR with active author follow-up; no duplicate, superseded, or low-signal closure basis exists.
Independent maintainer-review candidate; merge is blocked by job permissions and missing merge preflight, while close-style actions are not justified.
